reference: Hi, it would be the sole decision of the operating surgeon to decide about the type of anesthesia and the type of surgery planned for you. I suggest you meet with a plastic surgeon and take the appropriate advice according to the type of surgery planned. All the best.
text: Hi, it would be the sole decision of the operating surgeon to decide about the type of anesthesia and the type of surgery planned for you. I suggest you meet the plastic surgeon and take the appropriate advice according to the type of surgery plan. All the best.
